name: Love's Travel Stop #463
description: A 24-hour Love's travel stop on I-10 in Seguin with truck fueling, an on-site Love's Truck Tire Care center, and a CAT scale.

name: Love's Travel Stop #264
description: A 24-hour Love's travel stop at the I-10/US-90 junction in Luling offering diesel fueling and driver amenities.

name: Flatonia Travel Center
description: An independent Shell-branded travel center at the I-10 Exit 661 (Hwy 95) junction in Flatonia with truck parking, fuel lanes, showers and on-site food.

name: Columbus Travel Center
description: An independent Shell travel center on I-10 in Columbus with 24-hour diesel, truck parking, showers and quick-service food.

name: Sealy Truck Stop
description: An independent truck stop on the I-10 frontage road in Sealy offering a large truck parking lot, drivers' lounge and on-site restaurant/deli.

name: TravelCenters of America - Sealy
description: A 24-hour TA travel center near Sealy (Bernardo) off I-10 with Shell diesel, overnight truck parking, showers and laundry.

name: TravelCenters of America - San Antonio
description: A 24-hour TA travel center on the east I-10 corridor in San Antonio (Foster Rd) with truck fueling, repair bays, showers and a restaurant.

name: Petro Stopping Center - San Antonio
description: A large 24-hour Petro (TA) stopping center off I-10 at Ackerman Road in San Antonio with truck service bays, an Iron Skillet restaurant, showers and diesel.
